use_cases: Displaying customer testimonials with audio playback for enhanced social proof
Building trust and credibility on landing pages through voice testimonials
Adding interactive audio testimonials to product or service pages
ai_summary: A voice testimonial component that displays customer testimonials with optional audio playback functionality. Features animated waveform visualizations during playback and supports light/dark modes. Uses Framer Motion for smooth animations and manages audio state through React hooks. Ideal for showcasing authentic customer voices and building trust through audio testimonials on SaaS or e-commerce platforms.
